def solve(nums : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
  nums.sort!
  n = nums.size
  max_size = 1
  for i in 0..n-1
    target = nums[i] * k
    low = i
    high = n - 1
    best = i - 1
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2
      if nums[mid] <= target
        best = mid
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    current_size = best - i + 1
    if current_size > max_size
      max_size = current_size
    end
  end
  return n - max_size
end
```
